name: Plan Title
definition: Official title of the resilience plan document as published by the authoring organization.

name: Plan Type
definition: Classification of the plan document indicating its primary focus area or strategic purpose.

name: Adoption Year
definition: Year in which the plan was officially adopted, approved, or published by the responsible authority.

name: Planning Horizon (Years)
definition: Number of years from adoption that the plan is designed to cover, representing the intended implementation timeframe.

name: Total Actions
definition: Total count of discrete actions, initiatives, or interventions specified within the plan document.

name: Total Budget Mentioned
definition: Budget or financial resources mentioned in the plan, captured as free text due to varying formats and contexts.

name: Monitoring Approach
definition: Description of how the plan's implementation and outcomes will be monitored, evaluated, or reported over time.

name: Plan URI
definition: Unique resource identifier or persistent URL where the plan document can be accessed.

name: Document URL
definition: Direct URL to the published PDF or web version of the plan document.

name: Plan Status
definition: Current status of the plan in its lifecycle (draft, adopted, active, completed, superseded).

name: AUTHORED_BY
definition: Organization that created, wrote, or commissioned the development of the plan document.

name: IMPLEMENTED_BY
definition: Agency, department, or organization responsible for executing or overseeing implementation of the plan.

name: ALIGNS_WITH
definition: External framework, standard, or methodology that the plan explicitly references or aligns with.

name: SUPERSEDES
definition: Previous version or earlier plan that this plan replaces or updates.

name: SUPERSEDED_BY
definition: Newer version or updated plan that replaces this plan.

name: COVERS_LOCATION
definition: Geographic area, jurisdiction, or place that the plan addresses.

name: Geographic Scope
definition: Geographic area or jurisdiction covered by the plan (city, region, state, etc).

name: CONTAINS_ACTION
definition: Specific action, initiative, or intervention defined within the plan.

name: ADDRESSES_HAZARD
definition: Climate hazard, risk, or threat that the plan is designed to address or mitigate.

name: TARGETS_SECTOR
definition: Economic or social sector that the plan focuses on or impacts.
rationale: approve, but change to TARGETS_URBAN_SYSTEM and have it map to the urban systems node

name: REFERENCES
definition: Another plan that this plan explicitly cites, builds upon, or coordinates with.

name: FUNDED_BY
definition: Organization or funding body that provided financial resources for plan development or implementation.
rationale: these will almost all be funded by municpalities
